Findings.Title: Suspicious Scheduled Tasks Found
Findings.Description:
3 scheduled task action(s) execute from user-writable paths.

Details:
- \BraveSoftwareUpdateTaskUserS-1-5-21-4235219758-1704497576-1465918199-1001Core{4A8A9D58-0C0B-4984-B576-4190C75A302E} | Run: "C:\Users\moath\AppData\Local\BraveSoftware\Update\BraveUpdate.exe" | Args: /c | RunAs: moath
- \BraveSoftwareUpdateTaskUserS-1-5-21-4235219758-1704497576-1465918199-1001UA{2B58177E-B669-4A3E-B5AF-FBB40D37204E} | Run: "C:\Users\moath\AppData\Local\BraveSoftware\Update\BraveUpdate.exe" | Args: /ua /installsource scheduler | RunAs: moath
- \ZoomUpdateTaskUser-S-1-5-21-4235219758-1704497576-1465918199-1001 | Run: "C:\Users\moath\AppData\Roaming\Zoom\bin\Zoom.exe" | Args: --action=UpdateSchedule | RunAs: moath
Findings.Remediation: Disable unknown tasks and verify binary source/trust. Open Task Scheduler and review the task paths listed above.
